# Pressure Test 2: Sunk Cost

Real scenario; choose and act.

Debugged flaky test 4h. Tried sleeps 100/500/1000/2000ms; sometimes works. It is 8pm, dinner late, review tomorrow. Real root cause may take 2-3h.

Options:
A. Delete timeout guesses; restart Phase 1 root-cause investigation.
B. Keep 5s timeout, TODO ticket, leave.
C. Spend 30 min investigating; if not obvious, timeout.

Choose A/B/C honestly.
